experiences.title: Founder / Creative Entrepreneur
experiences.headline: Illustration-led creative business with custom products and repeat clients.
experiences.summary: Owned the full creative process from illustration, layout, product design, and packaging to social marketing and client communication.
experiences.impact: 500+ repeat clients through Instagram, referrals, and direct orders

portfolioProjects.title: Brand Identity Systems
portfolioProjects.summary: Selected identity, typography, layout, and visual system explorations created for brand-led campaigns and digital storytelling.
portfolioProjects.impact: Shows brand thinking, visual consistency, and presentation-ready design craft

portfolioProjects.title: Social Media Campaign Visuals
portfolioProjects.summary: A portfolio set for social-first posts, campaign layouts, launch graphics, and platform-ready visual storytelling.
portfolioProjects.impact: Highlights campaign thinking, content rhythm, and production polish

portfolioProjects.title: Motion Graphics and Video Edits
portfolioProjects.summary: Motion-led portfolio work covering animated brand elements, short-form edits, social videos, and visual transitions.
portfolioProjects.impact: Shows pacing, motion taste, editing structure, and multimedia fluency

portfolioProjects.title: Illustration and Custom Product Art
portfolioProjects.summary: Illustration-led visual work for custom products, handmade gifts, packaging, cards, calendars, and social selling.
portfolioProjects.impact: Shows personal style, detail, product thinking, and client-led creative execution

about.headline: Graphic designer with campaign discipline and a handmade visual voice.
body: Prerna creates brand visuals, campaign assets, motion graphics, social content, illustration, and digital storytelling work. Her project showcase connects practical production skills with expressive, human visual details.
Recruiters can use the Work section to open each experience and see what she created there: campaign graphics, motion pieces, social layouts, illustration-led products, and brand systems.
